heading: Implementation of depository library program by Director of the Government Publishing Office
label: 1914 Implementation of depository library program by Director of the Government Publishing Office
text: The Director of the Government Publishing Office, with the approval of the Joint Committee on Printing, as provided by , may use any measures he considers necessary for the economical and practical implementation of this chapter.section 103 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 81c (, , ).Pub. L. 87–579, § 1076 Stat. 356Aug. 9, 1962
Amendments2014— substituted “Director of the Government Publishing Office” for “Public Printer” in section catchline and text.Pub. L. 113–235
